customers.customer: THE G W VAN KEPPEL COMPANY

realizations.realization: 23504 of 23504 purchased stockouts are PFEP-preventable. One-time data fix = compounding ROI.
Cycle-count program has stopped (active days 0/10 = 0.0%) — accuracy KPIs are directional only.
100.0% of variance is un-attributable (Reason Code populated on 0.0% of adjustments). Root-cause targeting is impossible until the field is enforced.
MRP is running on an empty master — only 0.0% of active items have Safety Stock + ABC + Lead Time all populated. PFEP remediation is the prerequisite to any operational fix.
Pre-stage the top-20 fat-tail parts (p99 Days Late = 43.0). Cheaper than chasing median cycle-time.
Relationship review with MILESTONE CONTRACTORS  LP — kit complexity / order-shape conversation (47.0% of lates).
Supplier scorecard program with focused vendor cohort, not full base (top-5 suppliers = 100.0% of combined misses+lates).

pathways_systemic.name: Populate ABC Inventory Catalog
pathways_systemic.mechanism: Run ABC classification job against active items; write-back to PFEP master.
pathways_systemic.downstream_lift: Drives CC cadence under AST-INV-PRO-0001; unlocks safety-stock math.

pathways_systemic.name: Switch Safety Stock Planning Method
pathways_systemic.mechanism: Set non-zero Safety Stock + assign Safety Stock Planning Method for recoverable parts.
pathways_systemic.downstream_lift: Converts recoverable stockouts to on-time fills — compounding ROI per spec §4.4b.

pathways_systemic.name: Transaction Reason Code enforcement
pathways_systemic.mechanism: Required-field validation on cycle-count adjustment transactions.
pathways_systemic.downstream_lift: Variance becomes attributable; root-cause targeting becomes possible.

pathways_systemic.name: Assign Buyer / Planner codes
pathways_systemic.mechanism: Backfill Buyer Name / Planner on unattributed active items.
pathways_systemic.downstream_lift: Ownership routing — vendor scorecard program can run deterministically.

pathways_systemic.name: Item Cycle Count Enabled audit
pathways_systemic.mechanism: Audit & toggle Item Cycle Count Enabled flag against ABC-driven cadence.
pathways_systemic.downstream_lift: Restores the cycle-count program; CC accuracy becomes meaningful again.

pathways_operational.name: Pre-stage top-20 fat-tail parts
pathways_operational.mechanism: Standing safety-stock on parts with p99 Days Late > 30.
pathways_operational.downstream_lift: Collapses the fat tail; cheaper than chasing median cycle-time.

pathways_operational.name: Customer relationship review + order-shape conversation
pathways_operational.mechanism: Monthly review; reshape order cadence / kit complexity.

pathways_operational.name: Supplier scorecard + expedite protocol
pathways_operational.mechanism: Monthly scorecard on top-5 combined miss+late suppliers; expedite playbook for outliers.
pathways_operational.downstream_lift: Converts vendor-driven misses into on-time fills.

pathways_operational.name: Pick-wave rebalance + same-SO completion gate
pathways_operational.mechanism: WMS configuration: reshape pick waves by SO-completion, not by zone.
pathways_operational.downstream_lift: Direct OTD lift on EXECUTION-class misses.

pathways_operational.name: Kit-complete check at pick release
pathways_operational.mechanism: Block pick release until all lines on an SO are allocable.
pathways_operational.trigger_reason: Missing other item on same SO

pathways_operational.name: Fab-schedule sync + early-warning flag
pathways_operational.mechanism: Fab-to-ship daily sync meeting; raise flag at T-2 if fab slipping.

T+30: Close PFEP data gaps on active Buy items (Safety Stock + ABC + LT)
Enforce Transaction Reason Code on cycle-count adjustments
Stand up weekly OTD / IFR / CC scorecard with §4 window convention
T+60: Pick-wave rebalance pilot at highest-lateness site
Vendor scorecard for top-5 combined OTD+IFR suppliers
T+90: PFEP health review #2 — measure match-rate lift on miss parts
Extend cycle-count cadence audit to every site
Pre-stage top-20 fat-tail parts if R8 fired
T+180: Kit-complete check at pick release across all sites
Quarterly customer-relationship review with concentrated accounts
Re-baseline KPI goals using 90d rolling performance

governance.cadence: Weekly KPI review; bi-weekly realization review; monthly pathway progress.
